{card.icon}

); })}

const LocationPopCard = ({item}) => { const frame = useCurrentFrame(); const {fps} = useVideoConfig(); const props = item.props || {}; const headerText = props.headerText || 'CHECKPOINT'; const mainText = props.mainText || 'Portland, Oregon'; const subText = props.subText || 'Riverside Wheel Collective'; const headerColor = props.headerColor || '#b4e926'; const cardColor = props.cardColor || '#FFFFFF'; const textColor = props.textColor || '#000000'; const iconColor = props.iconColor || '#009e9e'; const fontFamily = props.fontFamily || '"Press Start 2P", "VT323", monospace'; const DESIGN_WIDTH = 520; const DESIGN_HEIGHT = 200; const scale = Math.min((item?.width || DESIGN_WIDTH) / DESIGN_WIDTH, (item?.height || DESIGN_HEIGHT) / DESIGN_HEIGHT); const safeFps = fps || 30; const entranceScale = spring({ frame, fps: safeFps, config: { damping: 12, mass: 1, stiffness: 180 } }); const rootStyle = { position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, width: DESIGN_WIDTH, height: DESIGN_HEIGHT, transform: `scale(${scale})`, transformOrigin: 'top left', backgroundColor: 'transparent', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }; const cardStyle = { width: 440, height: 120, backgroundColor: cardColor, border: `2px solid ${textColor}`, boxShadow: `6px 6px 0px 0px ${textColor}`, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', transform: `scale(${entranceScale})`, transformOrigin: 'center center', fontFamily, color: textColor, overflow: 'hidden' }; const headerStyle = { height: 32, backgroundColor: headerColor, borderBottom: `2px solid ${textColor}`, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between', padding: '0 12px' }; const dotStyle = { width: 10, height: 10, backgroundColor: cardColor, border: `2px solid ${textColor}` }; const bodyStyle = { flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', padding: '0 20px', gap: '20px' }; return (
{headerText}
{mainText}
{subText}
); };

return interpolate(spr, [0, 1], [28, 0]); }; const getOp = (index) => { const delay = index * STAGGER; const t = Math.min(Math.max((frame - delay) / 15, 0), 1); return t * (2 - t); }; const hlStart = (totalLine1 + totalLine2Pre) * STAGGER; const hlDuration = 30; const t = Math.min(Math.max((frame - hlStart) / hlDuration, 0), 1); const hlReveal = t * t; const revealPct = (hlReveal * 100).toFixed(3); const maskVal = 'linear-gradient(to right, black ' + revealPct + '%, transparent ' + revealPct + '%)'; const line1Style = { display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '0.28em' }; const line2Style = { display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.28em', marginTop: '0.02em' }; {l1Items}
{l2Items}{hiItems}
